title: ligularia dentata subsp. sutchuensis
intro: Ligularia dentata subsp. sutchuensis, also known as Sutchuen ligularia or Ligularia sutchuensis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. Ligularia dentata subsp. sutchuensis is valued for its health benefits, which include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to make traditional medicines, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
